mission: Get jessetek.net ranking locally for 'real estate agent in Downey and surrounding cities'
head_target: real estate agent in Downey and surrounding cities

target_queries.note: Mirrors the live tracked set in automation/.state/rank-history.json (downey realtor, whittier realtor, bilingual realtor downey, best realtor downey ca, first time buyer downey, homes for sale downey, realtor jesse onate, ...). Surrounding cities = the LA/OC cities Jesse actually serves per the office NAP, NOT arbitrary expansion.

measure_blocker_2026-06-28: run05 root-caused why MEASURE has reported FLAT since 2026-06-01: the GSC weekly harvester (net.jessetek.weekly-rank-watch) + daily-health-check/weekly-qc-sweep/weekly-clarity-review launchd jobs were NEVER re-installed after the Mac-mini->MacBook host migration; their generated plists still point at the dead /Users/jtek iCloud path. Only seo-brain + hourly-autopush were migrated. Fix is owner=jesse, 1 command (ledger E5, priority 0). Until fixed, the brain is blind on its core metric — treat all FLAT MEASURE reports as 'pipeline dead', not 'rank stable'.
shipped_2026-06-28: run03: fixed 28 broken #contact anchors site-wide (added id=contact to booking CTA on home/buyer/seller/es-index) — commit 559ef36
run04: stripped 12 fabricated Google-attributed Review nodes from reviews.html JSON-LD (S1 missed these) — schema-only, no visible content changed, 380/380 JSON-LD valid
shipped_2026-06-11: Stripped fabricated aggregateRating (5.0/100) from 105 files — FTC/Google compliance (commit e7f4443)
Opened robots.txt to AI search crawlers
Built the SEO Brain + ran the 2026 research playbook
gbp_inspected_2026-06-11: Live GBP: 20 Google reviews @ 5.0; primary category 'Real estate agent' = correct; address 830 N Wilcox Ave, Montebello CA 90640 (Montebello pin — favors Montebello/Pico/Bell Gardens proximity MORE than Downey itself, a structural limiter for the literal Downey goal); profile NOT 100% complete (first gap: storefront photo); /reviews shows a LIVE Jtek review-widget iframe pulling real Google reviews. Resolved the review-count blocker → corrected inflated '100+ reviews' to '20+' on 50 files (commit 77ad604).
reframe_status: CONFIRMED by 2026 research: head term is a map-pack/directory SERP; pursue the 3 winnable surfaces below
honest_reframe: Page-1 ORGANIC for the bare term 'real estate agent' (competing against Zillow/Realtor.com/Redfin) is structurally not winnable for a solo agent's website. The winnable, lead-driving version of this goal has three surfaces, in priority order: (1) the Google LOCAL MAP PACK for 'real estate agent in Downey' / 'real estate agent near me' — driven by Google Business Profile, NOT the website; (2) QUALIFIED ORGANIC long-tail — 'Downey real estate agent', 'bilingual real estate agent Downey', 'first time home buyer agent Downey'; (3) BRANDED — 'Jesse Onate realtor' (already ranking ~2.5). GSC proves rank is NOT the blocker — visibility/authority is.

baseline_kpis_2026-06-01.interpretation: Excellent rank, near-zero reach. Fix reach, not rank.

winnable_targets.target: Appear in the map pack for 'real estate agent Downey' / 'realtor near me' within Downey
winnable_targets.primary_lever: Google Business Profile (claim, verify, optimize, reviews, posts)
winnable_targets.definition_of_done: GBP appears in the 3-pack for at least 2 of: 'real estate agent downey', 'realtor downey', 'bilingual realtor downey' for a searcher located in Downey

winnable_targets.target: Page 1 for 'downey real estate agent', 'real estate agent in downey ca', 'bilingual real estate agent downey'
winnable_targets.primary_lever: Dedicated optimized page + internal links + authority
winnable_targets.definition_of_done: jessetek.net page ranks top 10 (GSC avg position <= 10 with real impressions) for >= 2 qualified Downey agent queries

winnable_targets.target: Own page 1 for 'jesse onate realtor' with site + GBP + Zillow + Realtor.com
winnable_targets.definition_of_done: jessetek.net is #1 and >= 3 owned/profile properties on page 1 for the branded query

definition_of_done_overall: Either (a) GBP shows in the Downey local pack for core 'real estate agent' queries, OR (b) a jessetek.net page holds top-10 average position with > 200 monthly impressions for qualified Downey agent terms — sustained for 2 consecutive GSC reporting weeks.

constraints.production_site: Live lead-gen site on Vercel, auto-deploys from git main. Jesse authorized push-when-verified (2026-06-11). The hourly loop auto-deploys ONLY whitelisted safe fixes (QC/schema/OG/internal-links) + drafts anything bigger.
constraints.usage_budget: Jesse chose HOURLY + Opus (max) for the autonomous loop on 2026-06-11 with full cost disclosure — overrides the default weekly/Sonnet cost stance for THIS loop. Loop self-throttles (idle runs near-free). Cut cost anytime via HOURLY_SEO_MODEL=sonnet in automation/config.local.sh.
constraints.no_black_hat: No bought links, no review gating, no NAP spam. Google penalizes all three.
